feature_descriptions.community_entropy: Shannon entropy of the community string (guessing past public/private)
feature_descriptions.distinct_oids: distinct OIDs queried per source over the window (full-tree walk)
feature_descriptions.error_rate: SNMP error responses per source over the window (noAccess / authFail probing)
feature_descriptions.pdu_type: encoded PDU (get / getnext / getbulk / set / trap / response)
feature_descriptions.request_rate: SNMP requests per source over the window (walk / enumeration)
feature_descriptions.set_rate: SET requests per source over the window (config tampering)
feature_descriptions.snmp_version: encoded version (v1 / v2c = cleartext community; v3 = auth)

schema_description: (batch) Suricata SNMP set: version/PDU, request/set/error rates, community and OID features
